'''Lay Pa-Sidian''' was a [[City/Legends|city]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[G'wenee/Legends|G'wenee]],<ref name="CEII2" /> an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] trade world. [[Kir Kanos|Kenix Kil]] captured customs officer [[Tarrant Snil]] for [[Grappa (Hutt)|Grappa]] the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] in Lay Pa-Sidian.

{{City-stub}}
